job_description: Seeking a Fullstack specialist (level: intermediate) for a 4–12 week engagement. The main scope is: Build the MVP for a fitness-tracking SaaS — Next.js app, PostgreSQL, Stripe billing. On top of that, you may help with build an inventory management web app with barcode scanning on mobile and desktop. Prior experience shipping similar projects is required — please link relevant work. Delivery is in two-week iterations with a demo at the end of each cycle.

There is also some adjacent work around build an internal admin tool with audit log and granular permissions. Code is reviewed in pull requests; mainline must always be deployable.

Stretch goal if time allows: Implement event sourcing for an e-commerce order lifecycle. Prior experience shipping similar projects is required — please link relevant work. Delivery is in two-week iterations with a demo at the end of each cycle.

Stretch goal if time allows: Migrate an existing Cordova app to Flutter with feature parity. You should be comfortable owning the work end-to-end and writing brief weekly updates. Weekly written status updates expected, with one async video walkthrough per milestone.
